faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Pomonok apartments?
faqs.answer: Pomonok residents most commonly encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants often enter through foundation cracks, while carpenter ants may nest in older wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Pomonok in most cases. Understanding that ant infestations can spread quickly in apartment buildings, we prioritize rapid response to prevent colonies from expanding throughout your living space or to neighboring units.
